title: Queen Cats & Dogs
description: Do you want to enjoy your everyday survival life with cute girls?, with Queen Cats & Dog you can turn both your cat and wolf companions, cuter!
body:
Do you want to enjoy your everyday survival life with cute girls?, with Queen Cats & Dog you can turn both your cat and wolf companions, cuter! 

🐈 Features

 

New Items

This mod adds four new items to the game:
Golden Fish
The Golden Fish can be used to turn normal cats into Queen Cats, heal them, and also craft the Kemomimi Potion, you can eat it too and it will work like a Golden Apple (may be disabled on later versions).
Golden Bone
The Golden Bone can be used to turn tamed Wolves into Queen Dogs.
Golden Wheat
The Golden Wheat can be used to turn Rabbits into Queen Bunnies.
Kemomimi Potion
The Kemomimi Potion it's crafted from Golden Fish, Golden Bone or Golden Wheat, it can be used to turn Cats, Wolves, and Rabbits into their Queen Variant, also can be used to breed Queen Cats, Queen Dogs and Bunnies, and make Princess Cats, Princess Dogs and Princess Bunnies grow faster.

New Entities

This mod adds eight new entities to the game:
Queen Cat
The Queen Cat can be obtained by using a Kemomimi Potion on a Tamed Cat, if spawned using Spawn Eggs, you can tame it with Golden Fish, they can be healed with any kind of raw fish (except pufferfish), you can also give them a Vanilla Chestplate for them to wear with Shift + Right Click, that also opens up their inventory.
Dyes (Black, White, Orange and Gray) can be used to change their colors.
Queen Dog
The Queen Dog can be obtained by using a Kemomimi Potion in a Tamed Wolf (which you own), if spawned using the Spawn Eggs, it can be tamed with Golden Bones, you can heal them with any kind of meat a normal wolf would eat, you can also give them a Vanilla Chestplate for them to wear with Shift + Right Click, that also opens up their inventory.
Dyes (Black, White, Gray and Pink) can be used to change their colors.
Queen Bunny
The Queen Bunny can be obtained by using a Kemomimi Potion in a Rabbit, if spawned using the Spawn Egg, it can be tamed with Golden Wheat, you can heal them with any kind of carrots and wheat, you can also give them a Vanilla Chestplate for them to wear with Shift + Right Click, that also opens up their inventory.
Dyes (Light Gray, White, Yellow and Pink) can be used to change their colors.
Queen Cow
The Queen Cow can be obtained by using a Kemomimi Potion on a Cow, if spawned using the Spawn Eggs, it can be tamed with Golden Wheat, you can heal them with primarily golden wheat, you can also give them a Chestplate for them to wear with Shift + Right Click, that command also opens up their inventory. They can be milked with a bucket or a bowl depending on the variant.
The Black, White, Red, Yellow and Brown dyes can be used to change their colors.
Princess Cat
The Princess Cat, can be obtained by breeding two Queen Cats together, has pretty much the same stats as a Queen Cat, being a tiny bit faster, they cannot equip armor quite yet but with Shift + Right Click, you can open up their inventory.
Dyes (Black, White, Orange and Gray) can be used to change their colors.
Princess Dog
The Princess Dog, can be obtained by breeding two Queen Dogs together, has pretty much the same stats as a Queen Dog, being a tiny bit faster, they cannot equip armor quite yet but with Shift + Right Click, you can open up their inventory.
Dyes (Black, White, Gray and Pink) can be used to change their colors.
Princess Bunny
The Princess Bunny, can be obtained by breeding two Queen Bunnies together, has pretty much the same stats as a Queen Bunny, being a tiny bit faster, they cannot equip armor quite yet but with Shift + Right Click, you can open up their inventory.
Dyes (Light Gray, White, Yellow and Pink) can be used to change their colors.
Princess Cow
The Princess Cow, can be obtained by breeding two Queen Cows together, has pretty much the same stats as a Queen Cow, being a tiny bit faster, they cannot equip armor quite yet but with Shift + Right Click, you can open up their inventory.
The Black, White, Red, Yellow and Brown dyes can be used to change their colors.

⛓ Compatibility

This mod should work with pretty much everything right of the bat, other mods that add Golden Bones and Golden Fish or Golden Wheat may collide when it comes to crafting recipes, I'll do my best to fix them it in future versions.  

🎥 Reviews

Special Thanks to: Asamasa, the creator of the original Minecraft Bedrock Addon.
